description: Assign group name s to zone gridpoints in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups .

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Assign group name s to zone gridpoints in the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove group s from the gridpoint. If no slot is specified the group assignment is removed from all slots it is found in.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s. The default slot is Default.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group to the slot named s . The default slot is Default .
